bio.0: I'm a frontend developer who focuses on building clean, performant, and accessible web applications. I care deeply about user experience and believe that great interfaces should feel invisible.
bio.1: With experience across the full JavaScript ecosystem, I enjoy turning complex requirements into simple, elegant solutions. When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new tools and contributing to the developer community.

extendedBio.0: I'm a frontend developer who focuses on building clean, performant, and accessible web applications. I care deeply about user experience and believe that great interfaces should feel invisible.
extendedBio.1: With experience across the full JavaScript ecosystem, I enjoy turning complex requirements into simple, elegant solutions. I'm most productive when working at the intersection of design and engineering — translating ideas into polished, production-ready interfaces.
extendedBio.2: When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new tools, contributing to the developer community, and staying curious about what's next in the web platform.

0.title: Frontend Engineer
0.description: Frontend engineer on an AI-powered voice & chat agent SaaS platform. Shipped 1,300+ commits and 200+ PRs across a React/TypeScript monorepo, owning core subsystems end-to-end — including a visual conversation designer, bundle versioning, webcall audio pipeline, and auth infrastructure. Led framework upgrades (React 19, Vite), performance refactors, and design system contributions.

1.title: Coding Bootcamp Graduate
1.description: Completed an intensive full-stack bootcamp covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Redux, and React Query. Built team projects with 5 collaborators. Self-learned Next.js App Router and foundational backend development after graduating.

2.title: Travel Agent
2.description: Handled B2B & B2C tour sales, attracting overseas customers and producing tours. Managed homepage production, marketing, and automated websites using Wix and scripting tools.

contact.heading: Let's Connect
